title: Bio Ops Shift Copilot
problem: wastewater operators need AI help that can reason over biological process state without pretending sensor-free predictions are certain.
direction: A shift-level wastewater operations copilot that turns synthetic microscopy/process logs into explainable biological state, confidence bands, and operator handoff notes.
why: Nyad describes itself as an AI copilot for wastewater, adding a microbiologist to every shift. The project focuses on uncertainty-aware operator support, missing-signal warnings, and handoff quality.
